name: Habitat For Humanity of the Charlotte Region - Financial Literacy Center
description_short: Habitat For Humanity of the Charlotte Region - Financial Literacy Center is a free credit assistance provider based in Charlotte, North Carolina. Rated 3.8/5 with 18 Google reviews, reflecting solid customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Habitat For Humanity of the Charlotte Region - Financial Literacy Center is a free credit assistance provider serving clients in Charlotte, North Carolina. Carrying a 3.8/5.0 Google rating from 18 reviews, Habitat For Humanity of the Charlotte Region - Financial Literacy Center has an solid reputation among consumers in the Charlotte area looking to access free credit counseling and financial guidance.

Operating as a donations center, volunteer organization, Habitat For Humanity of the Charlotte Region - Financial Literacy Center provides a range of services for consumers seeking free credit assistance solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Non-profit and free credit assistance providers in Charlotte offer valuable resources for consumers who need help but may not be able to afford paid services. Habitat For Humanity of the Charlotte Region - Financial Literacy Center provides an important community service, and consumers should verify the organization's non-profit status and HUD-approval where applicable. Free counseling sessions can be a good starting point before committing to paid credit repair or debt relief programs.

Consumers in the Charlotte, North Carolina area who are considering Habitat For Humanity of the Charlotte Region - Financial Literacy Center should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any free credit assistance provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
